case_title: OKAMURA, YOSHIHITO VS GWIRE, WILLIAM C/O GWIRE & FRASSETTO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY OKAMURA, YOSHIHITO AS TO DEFENDANT GWIRE, WILLIAM  C/O GWIRE & FRASSETTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT GWIRE, WILLIAM  C/O GWIRE & FRASSETTO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OKAMURA, YOSHIHITO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GWIRE, WILLIAM  C/O GWIRE & FRASSETTO JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 25442 ON 5/14/98. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
POS A TO DEFT WILLIAM HOM, FOR A PLAINTIFF CLAIM, BASE ON PAPERWORK FILED. NO SUCH DEFT LISTED FOR THIS CASE NO.
SYSTEM WOULD NOT LET ME ENTER THIS POS UNDER POS PROGRAM, BECAUSE THEIR IS ALREADY A VALID POS IN THE SYSTEM FOR PLAINTIFF CLAIM.
CONT.REQ.OF DEF; DID NOT SUBMIT $10.00 FEE. SENT OUT INFO.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 25442, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GWIRE, WILLIAM  C/O GWIRE & FRASSETTO
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-10-1998, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO FEB-25-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OKAMURA, YOSHIHITO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GWIRE, WILLIAM  C/O GWIRE & FRASSETTO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,046.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
